subject: How to export particles from several directories
body:
Hi,
I want to export particles from two different WarpTool directories taken at 
different dates.
I have one data_star file, which contains coordinates from both data sets.  
Can I export particles directly from two (or more) directories at once? If 
so, how can I do this?

Alternatively,  I could imagine the following way.  I first separate the 
one-star file into two and then export the particles separately; finally, I 
merge them for Relion5 processing. 

If you have done something like this, could you please share your 
experience with me?

Thank you very much!
With best wishes,
Reika
